user_prompt: Collect news articles about the prospect of agentic AI in near future and write a marketing post about our company, then post the output to Discord and Slack
content:
Reclaim your time with FlowAI! Imagine effortlessly gaining back 2 hours every day. Our advanced AI productivity software is here to revolutionize the way you work. By intelligently automating repetitive tasks and easing your workflow, FlowAI allows you to focus on what truly matters.

As the future of agentic AI unfolds, we're excited to integrate the latest advancements to supercharge your productivity. With tools designed to minimize context switching and tackle email overload, FlowAI empowers you to work smarter, not harder.

Join the movement towards a balanced, efficient work life where you can flow through your day with ease. Experience the benefits of intelligent automation and watch your productivity soar!
sources: • PEEK: Give Your Agent an Orientation Cache - Zhuohan’s Homepage — https://zhuohangu.github.io/blog-post-peek/
• DeepSWE: A contamination-free benchmark for long-horizon coding agents — https://deepswe.datacurve.ai/blog
• Turning data into intelligence for the AI native era — https://www.techtarget.com/searchstorage/opinion/Turning-Data-into-Intelligence-for-the-AI-Native-Era
• Cloud-flation: Dell's On-Premise AI Bet Pays Off — https://www.marketbeat.com/originals/cloud-flation-dells-on-premise-ai-bet-pays-off/?utm_source=yahoofinance&utm_medium=yahoofinance

• Machine-First Architecture: How To Build Websites Machines Can Identify, Read, Cite & Use via @sejournal, @slobodanmanic — https://www.searchenginejournal.com/machine-first-architecture-how-to-build-websites-machines-can-identify-read-cite-use/574431/

articles.title: PEEK: Give Your Agent an Orientation Cache - Zhuohan’s Homepage
articles.description: We introduce PEEK, a system that caches reusable orientation knowledge about a recurring external context as a small, prompt-resident context map.

articles.title: DeepSWE: A contamination-free benchmark for long-horizon coding agents
articles.description: DeepSWE measures frontier coding agents on original, long-horizon software engineering tasks.

articles.title: Turning data into intelligence for the AI native era
articles.description: Dell addresses AI implementation challenges -- data differentiation, hybrid workloads, token costs and infrastructure flexibility -- through its expanded AI portfolio.

articles.title: Cloud-flation: Dell's On-Premise AI Bet Pays Off
articles.description: Dell Technologies drives an enterprise hardware transformation by providing powerful, localized artificial intelligence infrastructure worldwide.

articles.title: Machine-First Architecture: How To Build Websites Machines Can Identify, Read, Cite & Use via @sejournal, @slobodanmanic
articles.description:
Designing for the most constrained consumer, a machine, produces a better foundation for every visitor. Here's the full build sequence.
The post Machine-First Architecture: How To Build Websites Machines Can Identify, Read, Cite & Use appeared first on Search…

denial_reason: Provide more details about agentic AI and its prospect and trends. It should sound more convincing (not too salesy).
full_post:
Reclaim your time with FlowAI! Imagine effortlessly gaining back 2 hours every day. Our advanced AI productivity software is here to revolutionize the way you work. By intelligently automating repetitive tasks and easing your workflow, FlowAI allows you to focus on what truly matters.

As the future of agentic AI unfolds, we're excited to integrate the latest advancements to supercharge your productivity. With tools designed to minimize context switching and tackle email overload, FlowAI empowers you to work smarter, not harder.

Join the movement towards a balanced, efficient work life where you can flow through your day with ease. Experience the benefits of intelligent automation and watch your productivity soar!
